description_long: This object is a modern smartphone with a sleek, rectangular form and rounded corners, featuring a large black glass touchscreen on the front. The back is a smooth, light gray surface with dual camera lenses and a flash module positioned in the top left corner. The sides are metallic, with visible physical buttons for volume and power, and the device is notably thin, emphasizing portability. The front display is blank, indicating the screen is off, and there are no visible logos or branding on any surface. The overall design is minimalist, with a focus on clean lines and a premium finish. The phone appears to be constructed primarily from glass and metal, typical of contemporary high-end mobile devices.
description: A slim, modern smartphone with a large black glass screen, dual rear cameras, and a minimalist light gray back. The device features metallic sides with physical buttons and a premium, sleek finish.
description_view_0: The back view shows a smooth, light gray surface with dual camera lenses and a flash in the top left corner.
description_view_1: The left edge view reveals the phone's thin profile and the placement of physical buttons along the metallic side.
description_view_2: The front view displays a large, black, blank glass touchscreen with a small front-facing camera and earpiece at the top.
description_view_3: The right edge view highlights the slimness of the device and additional side buttons, maintaining the metallic finish.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen is blank and turned off, with no visible content, icons, or interface elements.
attribute_camera_placement: There are two camera lenses and a flash module located in the top left corner on the back of the device, arranged horizontally.
attribute_button_layout: Physical buttons are visible along both the left and right metallic edges, likely including a volume rocker and power button.
